decisions.summary: Map serves â†’ operates_on_corridor as exact_alias
decisions.rationale: Both serves (count 6) and operates_on_corridor (count 9) represent a route operating on/traveling along a corridor. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: route subject â†’ corridor object. Examples: relation_m34-serves-corridor (route_m34-sbs â†’ corridor_34th-st-busway) and relation_rel-route-b44-sbs-serves-corridor-nostrand (route_b44-sbs â†’ corridor_nostrand-avenue) have the same query semantics.

decisions.summary: Map has_lead_entity â†’ has_lead_agency as exact_alias
decisions.rationale: Both has_lead_entity (count 2) and has_lead_agency (count 3) represent a project having a lead entity/agency. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: project subject â†’ entity object. Examples: relation_rel-project-has-entity-nycdot (project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study â†’ entity_nyc-dot) and relation_project-has-entity-nycdot (project_east-161st-st-bx6-capital â†’ entity_nyc-dot) carry the same semantics.

decisions.summary: Map community_outreach â†’ consulted as exact_alias
decisions.rationale: Both community_outreach (count 2) and consulted (count 2) represent a project engaging with a community board. Representative records show identical endpoint direction: project subject â†’ community-board object. Both involve the M86 SBS project and Manhattan Community Boards 7 and 8 with identical evidence sources (m86_sbs_progress_report_2017). Payloads carry the same query semantics.

decisions.summary: serves_route, covers_route, includes_route, affects_route are related-but-distinct
decisions.rationale: All four are projectâ†’route direction but differ semantically: serves_route (82) denotes service provision, covers_route (3) denotes ACE enforcement coverage, includes_route (5) denotes project scope inclusion, affects_route (5) denotes event impact. Payloads show distinct subject entity types (project vs event) and different query semantics.

partner (count 2, entityâ†”entity), has_partner (count 6, projectâ†’entity), and partner_agency (count 2, entityâ†’project) have different endpoint directions and subject/object types. Not exact aliases.
